name: Mint Molasses Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, salt, baking soda, and spices together.
2. Cream shortening, brown sugar, and mint extract until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg until combined.
4. Mix in molasses well.
5. Mix in dry ingredients until just blended.
6. Chill mixture for at least 2 hours.
7. Shape dough into walnut-sized balls.
8. Roll each ball in granulated sugar.
9. Place cookies about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes, or until crisp and browned.
11. Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
